reviews.comment:
Cargamos combustible, buena o da los playeros y pasamos x los clásicos de crudo y queso y cocido y queso. Ah no sabes lo que te perdés sino los probaste !!! Cada YPF te sorprende y mima siempre

(Translated by Google)
We filled up with gas, the attendants were great, and we stopped by the classic ham and cheese and ham and cheese sandwiches. Oh, you don't know what you're missing if you haven't tried them! Every YPF station surprises and pampers you.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
I went expecting their famous prosciutto sandwiches. I think a traditional white bread sandwich is much bigger. I was disappointed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2treFdWUjFObXQ1WDJZNVEyRTVVMDl2TUhKRFJWRRAB

reviews.comment:
Estuvimos el miércoles 18/3/26 en la estación de servicio de Los Altares y queremos destacar la excelente atención de Maite. Fue muy amable y atenta, no solo con nosotros sino con todas las personas que iban entrando. En mi caso, tuvo el detalle de orientarme sobre qué opciones podía comer siendo vegetariana, algo que realmente se valora cuando estás viajando.
Además, la estación estaba limpia y ordenada, lo que hace que ese alto en el camino sea aún más agradable.
Como detalle a mejorar, en el baño faltaba jabón.
Da gusto encontrarse con lugares y personas así. ¡Muchas gracias!

(Translated by Google)
We were at the Los Altares service station on Wednesday, March 18, 2026, and we want to highlight Maite's excellent service. She was very kind and attentive, not only to us but to everyone who came in. In my case, she thoughtfully suggested vegetarian options, something that is truly appreciated when traveling.

Furthermore, the station was clean and tidy, which made that stop even more pleasant. The only thing that could be improved is that there was no soap in the restroom.
It's wonderful to find places and people like this. Thank you so much!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xkUmRUWkRZMDVpWjBKUWNUVk5TV295TjFScWFVRRAB

reviews.comment:
Los chicos de la estación son muy serviciales.  Los sanitarios están limpios y el shop de la Full es lindo, limpio, sin moscas!!!  Y las chicas muy amables

(Translated by Google)
The guys at the station are very helpful. The restrooms are clean, and the Full convenience store is nice, clean, and fly-free! And the girls are very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2sxdlVYaGFTVXRtUWt3MVMwWTNWVFpKV1ZGVFgxRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent station, very good service, very nice restrooms with showers, and a lovely bar with delicious food. Greetings from a Uruguayan.

reviews.comment:
Soy socia del ACA y siempre paro en las YPF Full, además de cargar nafta, porque tienen varias opciones de comida y muy buen café! No fue este el caso ya que el café estuvo tan lavado que no tenía gusto a nada. Una decepción!

(Translated by Google)
I'm a member of the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) and I always stop at YPF Full stations, not only to fill up, but also because they have several food options and very good coffee! This time, however, the coffee was so weak it tasted like nothing. A disappointment!

reviews.comment:
1 de marzo 2026 paramos en los altares a cargar. Los playeros muy agradables.
Comimos ahí y conseguimos hasta empanadas de vegetales y café con leche vegetal ya que una de nosotras es vegana. Ni siquiera en YPF de Madryn conseguimos eso. Punto para altares. 💪

(Translated by Google)
On March 1, 2026, we stopped at the Altares gas station to refuel. The attendants were very friendly.
We ate there and even got vegetable empanadas and coffee with plant-based milk since one of us is vegan. We couldn't even find that at the YPF station in Madryn. Point for Altares! 💪
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/17063090883587948659/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pCVGMzTjZhalpxWVRKT2VDMXRSMlIxZVdwRmRYYxAB
